name: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc.
summary: PART I BUSINESS COMPANY OVERVIEW We are a fully integrated, leading central nervous system, or CNS, precision neuroscience biopharmaceutical company translating insights from genetic epilepsies into the development of therapies for CNS disorders characterized by neuronal excitation-inhibition imbalance.
